items.title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation, Shri Amit Shah, extends warm greetings to the NCB personnel on their Raising Day
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Home Affairs Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation, Shri Amit Shah, extends warm greetings to the NCB personnel on their Raising Day A premier agency dedicated to shielding our youth from drugs, NCB shoulders responsibility with deftness NCB is advancing Modi Ji's vision of drug-free India at remarkable pace Nation salutes their dedication and patriotism Po…

items.title: ITDC and Ministry of Tribal Affairs Inaugurate Capacity Building Program for Tribal Homestay Owners
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Tourism ITDC and Ministry of Tribal Affairs Inaugurate Capacity Building Program for Tribal Homestay Owners Posted On: 17 MAR 2026 11:39AM by PIB Delhi The India Tourism Development Corporation (ITDC) , under the Ministry of Tourism in collaboration with the Ministry of Tribal Affairs , held the inaugural opening ceremony of the Capacity Building Program for Tribal H…
